summary: Login Activity Notifications - Iteration 11 testing completed. All backend APIs working correctly (10/10 tests passed). Frontend components verified - Login Activity section renders on Profile page, secure-account page handles token validation states correctly. CORS issues in preview environment prevent live API calls from frontend (expected - documented in agent context).

integration_issues.flow: Login Activity API calls from frontend
integration_issues.issue: CORS blocks API calls in preview environment (frontend uses dynopay.com as base URL)
integration_issues.note: This is expected behavior documented in agent context - frontend code is correct, CORS is a preview environment limitation

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user. Multiple login activities created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login Activity features fully tested. Backend: tbl_login_activities table records logins with device/browser/os/location/security_token. GET /api/user/login-activity returns paginated history. POST /api/user/security/flag-login is CSRF-exempt public endpoint that flags logins and locks accounts for 24h. Frontend: LoginActivity.tsx component renders on Profile page with device icons, location, IP, relative time. secure-account.tsx handles loading/success/error/invalid states. Note: Preview environment has CORS issues because NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL points to dynopay.com (production).
